acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was worked in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode...
alkylation reagent: alkylation using 20 mM iodoacetamide at 25°C for 45 min in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylation using 20 mM iodoacetamide at 25°C for 45 min in the dark
collision energy: with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 27%
fragmentation method: MS/MS fragmentation was carried out with higher-energy collision dissociation (HCD)
instrument: analyzed on a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer
labeling: quantified a global Khib proteome using SILAC and mass spectrometry
reduction concentration: by reacting with 10 mM DTT at 37°C for 1 h
